base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of prototype_characters_unused — a character from 1988 super mario bros 2. Prototype/unused character sprites — early Doki Doki Panic protagonists (Imajin/Mama/Lina/Papa) retained in ROM. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Prototype/unused character sprites — early Doki Doki Panic protagonists (Imajin/Mama/Lina/Papa) retained in ROM
